content.json:
# mdk — golden signals (Azure-native)

Ops dashboard for the **mdk (movate-cli)** runtime/worker over the **OTLP → Azure Monitor** stream (ADR 015 / ADR 020). The OTel Collector's `azuremonitor` exporter lands telemetry in the **workspace-based App Insights** `App*` tables:

| OTel signal | Azure table | Key columns |
| --- | --- | --- |
| metrics (`mdk.*` instrument names, dot-form preserved) | `AppMetrics` | `Name`, `Sum`, `Properties[...]` |
| spans (e.g. `agent.execute`) | `AppDependencies` | `Name`, `DurationMs`, `Success`, `AppRoleName` |
| HTTP server spans (`/api/v1`, `/healthz`) | `AppRequests` | `Success`, `AppRoleName` |

Metrics covered: `mdk.jobs.completed`, `mdk.job.duration_ms`, `mdk.jobs.in_flight`, `mdk.run.tokens`, `mdk.run.cost_usd` (defined in `src/movate/tracing/metrics.py`). The thresholds match the **item-27 SLO alerts** (`infra/azure/modules/monitor-alerts.bicep`); jump to the Alerts blade from the link below to see them firing.

links.linkLabel: Open Azure Monitor Alerts (item-27 SLO rules: dead-letter / error-rate / latency-p95 / availability)

content.json:
## Latency — mdk.job.duration_ms

Job wall-clock duration (claim → terminal). The histogram instrument is reported by the exporter as `AppMetrics` rows; `agent.execute` span `DurationMs` (`AppDependencies`) gives a span-level percentile cross-check that matches the latency SLO alert.

content.query:
AppDependencies
| where Name == "agent.execute" and AppRoleName == "movate-runtime"
| summarize p50 = percentile(DurationMs, 50), p95 = percentile(DurationMs, 95), p99 = percentile(DurationMs, 99) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: agent.execute duration percentiles (p50 / p95 / p99, ms)

content.json:
## Throughput & errors — mdk.jobs.completed

Terminal-job counts by `status` (success / error / safety_blocked / dead_letter). The `status` attribute is in `AppMetrics` `Properties["status"]`; the counter value is the `Sum` column.

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.jobs.completed"
| extend status = tostring(Properties["status"])
| summarize Jobs = sum(Sum) by status, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Job completions by status (mdk.jobs.completed)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.jobs.completed"
| extend status = tostring(Properties["status"])
| summarize Total = sum(Sum), NonSuccess = sumif(Sum, status != "success"), DeadLetters = sumif(Sum, status == "dead_letter") by bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| extend ErrorPct = iff(Total == 0, 0.0, round(100.0 * NonSuccess / Total, 2))
| project TimeGenerated, ErrorPct, DeadLetters
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Error rate (%) and dead-letters — thresholds: error >10%, dead-letter >1 (item-27 SLO)

content.json:
## Saturation — mdk.jobs.in_flight

Jobs currently claimed by workers (not yet terminal). Up-down counter, so the latest `Sum` per scrape is the live depth. (A true queue-depth instrument is deferred to item #27 and not yet emitted.)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.jobs.in_flight"
| summarize InFlight = avg(Sum) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Jobs in flight (mdk.jobs.in_flight)

content.json:
## Cost & tokens — mdk.run.cost_usd, mdk.run.tokens

LLM spend and token volume from executed runs, by `tenant` (`Properties["tenant"]`).

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name == "mdk.run.cost_usd"
| extend tenant = tostring(Properties["tenant"])
| summarize CostUsd = sum(Sum) by tenant, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: LLM cost (USD) per hour by tenant (mdk.run.cost_usd)

content.query:
AppMetrics
| where Name in ("mdk.run.cost_usd", "mdk.run.tokens")
| summarize Value = sum(Sum) by Name
| extend Metric = iff(Name == "mdk.run.cost_usd", "Cumulative cost (USD)", "Cumulative tokens")
| project Metric, Value
content.title: Cumulative cost & tokens (selected range)

$comment: ADR 031 D2 Azure Monitor workbook for mdk golden signals. Metric instrument names referenced: mdk.jobs.completed, mdk.job.duration_ms, mdk.jobs.in_flight, mdk.run.tokens, mdk.run.cost_usd (src/movate/tracing/metrics.py). Span name agent.execute (AppDependencies). Scope to the Log Analytics workspace the workspace-based App Insights writes its App* tables to (logs.outputs.workspaceId in infra/azure/main.bicep). See dashboards/README.md.
